---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you want -->

## Problem/Pain Point
<!-- Describe the current problem or pain point, and how this feature solves it -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your proposed solution -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions you've considered -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Describe the use cases and user groups for this feature -->

## Technical Implementation Suggestions
<!-- If you have technical implementation suggestions, describe them here -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I have confirmed this is not a duplicate issue
- [ ] I have described the feature requirements in detail
- [ ] I have explained the use cases
- [ ] I have read the contributing guide

## Additional Information
<!-- Any other information that helps understand this feature -->
